pr-evidence/repository-hygiene-tracked-a.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer found false negatives for env/credential files, wheels/sdists, and .pyd files; fixes were applied and final re-review approved.
verification: poetry build -> built sdist and wheel
what_changed: Added a repository hygiene regression guard that verifies .gitignore covers local build, cache, environment, and credential artifacts.
Added a tracked-file guard that rejects committed build outputs, caches, local env files, credentials, wheels, and sdists while allowing .env.example.
Documented the new hygiene test in tests/README.md.
pr-evidence/repository-hygiene-tracked-a.why: The V1 package goal requires strict repository cleanliness and no generated artifacts, local configuration, logs, or credentials to be pushed.
